acceptance.criterion: Valid bounded TODO and checkpoint artifacts pass, while malformed IDs, missing validation, limits, multiple active items, identity mismatches, and runtime-root escapes fail with stable codes.
acceptance.evidence: tests.test_native_worker_prewalk artifact schema/path cases pass in the 38-test B0 focused gate.

acceptance.criterion: Model-free transition validation accepts task-relevant source, test-first, or product-documentation edits and rejects empty, staging-only, forbidden, outside-worktree, branch, origin, tag, or protected-ref changes.
acceptance.evidence: MeaningfulEditTests prove source, red-test, and product-doc acceptance plus empty/staging/forbidden/worktree/authority rejection.

acceptance.criterion: Routing reports requested and actual prewalk mode, distinct guide/execution routes, advertised versus behavioral capability facts, instruction fidelity, provenance, fallback, and zero qualification model calls.
acceptance.evidence: RouteDecisionMatrixTests and read-only installed help probes separate advertised grammar from behavioral qualification and report distinct routes/fallback.

acceptance.criterion: `worker.prewalk` accepts only `off`, `auto`, or `required`, preserves existing safe preference precedence, grants no authority, and leaves unqualified auto runs on the backward-compatible single-phase route.
acceptance.evidence: GlobalPreferencesTests and route matrix cover off|auto|required, precedence, authority rejection, atomic-task skip, and unqualified auto fallback.

acceptance.criterion: A fixture run traverses staged, guide, transition, execution, and complete states; sends the packet once; resumes with only `Continue.`; retains one exact session/worktree; and exposes both phases in one private follow log.
acceptance.evidence: Two-phase fixture state and follow-log assertions prove staged through complete, one packet delivery, Continue-only resume, and one session/worktree.

acceptance.criterion: Missing or malformed TODO/checkpoint, session/worktree mismatch, forbidden edits, guide failure, resume failure, and post-edit cold fallback fail closed with stable actionable state while preserving the worktree and logs.
acceptance.evidence: Lifecycle fixtures cover missing/malformed artifacts, forbidden edits, branch/session drift, guide recovery, dirty fallback rejection, and execution failure.

acceptance.criterion: Codex uses exact `codex exec resume <session-id>` and Claude uses exact `--resume <uuid>` with explicit guide/execution model and effort, registered CWD/write roots, no ambiguous selector, and no packet replay.
acceptance.evidence: NativeTransportParityTests prove exact Codex and Claude create/resume grammar, route pins, CWD, Git roots, and selector exclusions.

acceptance.criterion: Tiny all-complete tasks may terminalize after the guide only when the task-complete checkpoint and normal completion/Git contracts hold; otherwise a zero guide exit means transition-ready, not complete.
acceptance.evidence: Atomic fixture terminalizes only with all-complete TODO and task_complete checkpoint; missing artifacts fail before execution.

acceptance.criterion: Existing version-2 and single-phase native-worker launch, status, follow, redaction, environment scrubbing, sandboxing, PID identity, Git authority, and no-push tests remain green.
acceptance.evidence: 127 focused prewalk, routing, session grammar, and existing native-worker lifecycle tests pass.

acceptance.criterion: Canonical and user-facing docs define prewalk only as exact-session guide-to-execution trajectory continuity, explicitly reject cold handoffs, preserve driver authority, and give equivalent valid Codex/Claude operations.
acceptance.evidence: SKILL/README/guide plus prewalk, host-parity, routing, E2E, schema, release, and durable docs define exact-session continuity and reject cold handoffs.

acceptance.criterion: Documentation reports retained-safe versus pruned instruction fidelity honestly, states that static help is not behavioral proof, and keeps automatic rollout disabled or conservative until both hosts are live-qualified.
acceptance.evidence: references/prewalk.md and capability state distinguish pruned, turn_scoped, retained_safe, unsupported, advertised help, and version-bound behavioral proof.

acceptance.criterion: Fresh installed Codex and Claude bundles contain the prewalk runtime/reference and pass smoke checks without source-checkout-only helper dependencies.
acceptance.evidence: Fresh Claude and Codex installed-bundle smokes import every runtime module and assert references/prewalk.md plus cobbler_runtime/prewalk.py in both layouts.

acceptance.criterion: Focused suites, repository consistency, `git diff --check`, and `python3 scripts/verify_repo.py --version Unreleased` pass on the reviewed exact tip.
acceptance.evidence: Focused 226-test review slice, consistency, git diff --check, full and final-readiness verification pass; the exact local --ci gate passes after renaming one host-normalization variable that triggered the strict named-token secret scan.

acceptance.criterion: The new PR is open against `main`, unmerged, and its description explains the old cold-handoff gap, implemented exact-session mechanism, parity evidence, pruning fidelity, verification, and remaining live qualification/rollout limits.
acceptance.evidence: PR #80 is open and unmerged against main with mechanism, parity, fidelity, verification, and live-qualification rollout sections.

continuation_guard.next_action: Prove and push the CI secret-scan correction, rerun exact-tip landing/readiness, wait for PR #80 checks, then clean operational run artifacts.

master_acceptance.criterion: One supervised native-worker run can begin on an explicit guide route, create a bounded validation-bearing TODO, make a meaningful edit, and automatically resume the exact same provider session and worktree on an explicit execution route with only `Continue.`.
master_acceptance.evidence: Two-phase deterministic fixture proves guide TODO/edit/checkpoint and automatic exact-session/worktree Continue-only execution resume.

master_acceptance.criterion: The packet is sent exactly once; fresh sessions, copied transcripts, progress-note handoffs, ambiguous resume selectors, and post-edit cold fallback are never accepted or described as prewalk.
master_acceptance.evidence: Packet-count, resume-input, ambiguous-selector, guide-recovery, clean-fallback labeling, and post-edit fallback-prohibition tests pass.

master_acceptance.criterion: Codex and Claude provide equivalent state, route, TODO/checkpoint, follow, recovery, failure, installation, and documentation semantics with fixture-backed tests and honest behavioral-qualification limits.
master_acceptance.evidence: Codex/Claude parity tables, versioned help fixtures, shared lifecycle tests, consistency pins, and both installed-bundle smokes pass.

master_acceptance.criterion: Existing single-phase workers and all environment, redaction, sandbox, Git-authority, protected-ref, PR, merge, and terminal-review contracts remain intact.
master_acceptance.evidence: Existing native-worker session and worker CLI suites plus full repository verification pass; authority invariants remain canonical and tested.

master_acceptance.criterion: The exact final tip passes focused and canonical verification, cumulative review finds no unresolved serious issue, and an unmerged PR is ready for human review.
master_acceptance.evidence: Cumulative origin/main...HEAD self-review fixed exact-route qualification, model-call provenance, instruction-delivery fidelity, authority drift, symlink paths, missing resumed-session IDs, and orphaned supervision; full verification passes and PR #80 remains unmerged.
